ops.body:
2026-07-21 PHASE 3 COMPLETE — hosted calibration path validated live end-to-end; first mint landed. Registry: watcher-hosted v001-20260721-cdfabf2f3a48 (parent v002-20260718-cdfabf2f3a48 bytes verbatim; thresholds.budget 3.668e-05 vs local 7.067e-05; provenance carries endpoint, eval_auc 0.9289, n_rows 628, fires_per_100 2.0, eval_digest e85dc4a2ec94aae0). Isolation proven: watcher/gate currents and daemon PID 97342 untouched, no kickstart.

The road there found and killed a two-defect INSTRUMENT failure in the shipping scorer (cc-steer 013bff0b, CI pending at comment time): (1) HttpDrafter scored via chat/completions top_logprobs=20 — 197/628 frame rows below top-20 became forced fires (31/100 vs the 2/100 budget), collapsing the fitted threshold to ~0; (2) a hardcoded THINK_PREFILL string instead of the canonical divergence rendering. Fix: /v1/completions + prompt_logprobs:0 with the divergence prefix (shared core with retrain.sentinel via prefix_and_sentinel_via; tokenizer Qwen/Qwen3-8B @ b968826d, eager-loaded), below-top-k machinery deleted repo-wide. Live validation additionally surfaced two live-only defects offline mocks cannot see (both folded into the same commit): jinja2 missing from the http extra, and no follow_redirects=True — Modal's scale-to-zero wake handshake 303s, which would have made the daemon fail-open on every cold start. Papercut filed on the offline-coverage hole (stub-injected tokenizer + transport = zero real-render/real-network coverage).

Validation evidence (disk): ~/.cc-steer/eval/hosted-calib-promptlogprobs-20260720.jsonl (exact-path ground truth, 628 rows, AUC 0.9290, reproduced twice) + hosted-calib-bfix-20260720.jsonl + hosted-calib-bfix-diff-20260720.json (production-class per-row compare: AUC delta 0.00044, local-cut fire set identical 26=26, one 4.18e-06 boundary straddler at the fitted cut — inside the reference's own run-to-run band of ±2 rows/±0.0009 AUC, judged PASS on noise-floor grounds). Cold-303 validated live: post-scale-to-zero cold nosteer_prob through the production client → 200, 169.2s.

Substrate numbers for the snapshot decision deferred here from phase 1: warm-cache cold start is 170s (not the phantom ~70s), warm calls sub-second, scale-to-zero ~120s idle. For a dark lane 170s is acceptable; memory snapshots remain an option if the hosted lane ever goes live-serving. Spend: $0.56 total (A10G $0.53 + mem/CPU), well under the $10 envelope. Infra: Modal app athome-modal-vllm (staging, deployed dark), volumes cc-steer-watcher-adapter + cc-steer-hf-cache (pre-warmed Qwen3-8B @ b968826d), [serve.modal-vllm] config section.

Criterion ad9adbf0 stays pending on its second clause only — the 9B candidate promoted through this now-validated gate is phase 4, which also owns the PEFT-at-source uploader per the 2026-07-19 design comment.
